use_cases: Portfolio or project showcases with smooth scroll-driven card scaling effects
Product galleries that reveal items progressively as users scroll through a section
Creative agency or design studio showcases featuring image-heavy layouts
Case study pages with sticky image cards that expand during scroll
Interactive landing pages with parallax-style image reveals
ai_summary: A scroll-animated image gallery component that uses Framer Motion's useScroll and useTransform to create sticky card effects. Images scale up smoothly as the user scrolls through a container, with responsive sizing for mobile, tablet, and desktop. The component uses Lenis for smooth scrolling and displays a horizontal stack of project images that become fixed-positioned cards during scroll progress, making it ideal for portfolio showcases and creative presentations.
